meaning: adj.[医]血蛋白过少的,着色不足的
examples: The most common cause for a hypochromic microcytic anemia is iron deficiency.
Only anemia in patients enrolled in Group EVL showed a trend toward the features of microcytic, hypochromic anemia.
The RBC of rats exposed to cadmium can also became anisocytosic, hypochromic and formation of ring—type RBC, suggesting iron deficiency.
